title: fix: consistent separator in ACE-Step description
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: A dash of consistency
gist.blurb: Swapped an em dash for a hyphen in the ACE-Step audio model description. Small details matter when you're building the hive!
gist.summary: Standardized the separator used in the ACE-Step audio model description to match the rest of the registry.
gist.impact: Model descriptions now use consistent punctuation across the entire audio registry.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee mascot acting as a meticulous editor, holding a giant hyphen block next to a retro terminal displaying audio waves.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, holding a chunky lime green (#ecf874) hyphen block next to a retro terminal displaying audio waves. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
